items.title: Open-source revenue leak detection
items.oneliner: Session replays, heatmaps, and cohort baselines help product teams find conversion drop-offs before they hit revenue.

items.title: JetBrains graph database for apps
items.oneliner: Object-oriented graph database avoids runtime joins and offers O(1) link traversal for relationship-heavy application data.

items.title: Ship Apple apps from CLI
items.oneliner: Practical walkthrough shows how to build, sign, notarize, and ship macOS and iOS apps without Xcode.

items.title: Modern Core War toolchain
items.oneliner: Rust simulator and browser playground let you assemble, test, and benchmark Core War programs faster than pMARS.

items.title: Animated loaders for React apps
items.oneliner: Installable React loader components drop into shadcn projects and give you customizable loading states without design busywork.

items.title: Experimental Git history workflow
items.oneliner: Hands-on guide covers git history fixup, reword, and split for safer commit surgery across dependent branches.

items.title: Minimal language for circuit growth
items.oneliner: Experimental HDL shows how recursive graph rewiring can generate combinational circuits with inferred wire sizes.

items.title: Free wireless systems textbook
items.oneliner: Stanford's full wireless communication book covers MIMO, CDMA, and opportunistic scheduling with exercises engineers can study today.

items.title: Live satellite tracking map
items.oneliner: Interactive 3D tracker visualizes 30,000 satellites in real time and is useful for demos, education, and space data exploration.

items.title: Practical knot reference index
items.oneliner: Searchable knot guide covers loops, bends, hitches, and untying tips for field work, climbing, and sailing.
